data.name: Naughty Laundry
data.detailed_description:
Naughty Laundry is an adult management simulation game with visual novel-like elements. This game is a full redo of the initial Naughty Laundry prototype, redoing the gameplay, art style, and overall aspect of the game. But same as before, you're a mysterious laundry shop owner who does some strange and naughty stuff to your customers.

Please do mind that you and your washing machines are not normal at all!

How to Play

Naughty Laundry [Redux]  is a quirky simulation game where you run a seemingly ordinary laundry shop on the outskirts of town. Your job? Wash clothes, satisfy your customers, and keep the machines humming. But beneath the bubbles and steam, something strange is going on. Because these machines don’t just clean clothes—they reveal secrets, awaken desires, and sometimes... transform customers into something else entirely. Manage your shop, uncover bizarre stories, and decide how deep you want to dive into the sudsy, seductive mystery of Naughty Laundry.

The current gameplay loop includes interacting with different characters as they go to your mysterious laundry shop. Your job is to interact with and entertain these characters. However, you're free to experiment however you like!

data.short_description: Run a strange laundry shop where the machines do more than clean. Satisfy quirky customers, manage your business, and uncover bizarre stories as clothes reveal secrets, desires, and transformations in this seductive simulation.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
